product_overview: Solennix is a SaaS web app for event organizers to manage clients, products/recipes, inventory, events (with financials and payments), calendar, and PDF document generation. It provides admin tools and Stripe-based subscription management for plan gating and upgrades.
core_goals: Provide end-to-end event lifecycle management (clients -> products -> events -> payments -> reports).
Enable efficient inventory and recipe cost tracking to produce accurate budgets and shopping lists.
Offer clear financial KPIs and calendar tools for operational planning and business oversight.
Support secure user authentication, plan-based feature limits, and Stripe-powered subscriptions.
Deliver admin capabilities for platform analytics and user management.

features.name: User Login
features.description: Authenticate users via email and password, redirecting to the main dashboard on success and showing validation or server errors on failure.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Fill email input field -> Fill password input field -> Click Login button to submit -> Redirect to /dashboard -> See financial KPI cards
Navigate to /login -> Fill email input field -> Fill password input field -> Click Login button to submit -> See error message on invalid credentials

features.name: User Registration
features.description: Create a new account by providing name, email and password, then redirect to the dashboard on success or show validation errors on problems.
user_flows: Navigate to /register -> Fill name input field -> Fill email input field -> Fill password input field -> Fill confirm password field -> Click Register button -> Redirect to /dashboard

Navigate to /register -> Fill name input field -> Fill email input field -> Fill password input field -> Fill confirm password field (mismatch) -> Click Register button -> See validation errors for password confirmation

features.name: Password Recovery
features.description: Allow users to request a password reset email and set a new password using a tokenized link.
user_flows: Navigate to /forgot-password -> Fill email input field -> Click send reset link button -> See confirmation message
Open reset link from email -> Navigate to /reset-password -> Fill new password -> Click reset password button -> Redirect to /login
Navigate to /forgot-password -> Fill email input field (unknown email) -> Click send reset link button -> See confirmation message (no account revealed)
Open reset link from email -> Navigate to /reset-password -> Fill new password -> Click reset password button (expired/invalid token) -> See error message about invalid or expired token

features.name: Dashboard
features.description: Show high-level business metrics, upcoming events, charts, and low-stock inventory alerts for authenticated users.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard -> See financial KPI cards (net sales, cash collected, VAT) -> See monthly event status chart -> See upcoming events list -> See low stock inventory alerts
Navigate to /dashboard (unauthenticated) -> Be redirected to /login -> See login form

features.name: Client Management
features.description: List, create, edit, view, delete and export clients with search, sort and pagination; show client event history on the client detail page.
user_flows: Navigate to /clients -> View client list with search bar -> Type in search bar -> See filtered client list

Navigate to /clients -> Click New Client button -> Navigate to /clients/new -> Fill client form (name, phone, email, address, city, notes) -> Upload client photo -> Click Save client -> Redirect to /clients -> See new client in list
Navigate to /clients -> Click a client entry -> Navigate to /clients/:id -> See client details with event history
Navigate to /clients -> Click delete on a client -> See confirmation dialog -> Confirm delete -> See client removed from list
Navigate to /clients -> Click New Client button -> Navigate to /clients/new -> Fill client form with invalid email -> Click Save client -> See validation errors

features.name: Event Management
features.description: Create and manage events using a 5-step wizard, manage products/extras/equipment, handle payments (manual and Stripe), upload photos, change status, and generate PDFs.
user_flows: Navigate to /events/new -> Select client -> Set date -> Set time -> Select service type -> Enter guest count -> Click Next to go to Step 2
Step 2: Add products from catalog -> Set product quantities -> Click Next to go to Step 3
Step 3: Add extra line item (description, cost, price) -> Click Next to go to Step 4
Step 4: Check equipment conflicts -> Add equipment if available -> Click Next to go to Step 5

Step 5: Set discount -> Set tax rate -> Set deposit percent -> Set cancellation policy -> Click Save -> Redirect to /events/:id/summary -> See event summary with tabs (summary, ingredients, contract, payments, photos)
Navigate to /events/:id/summary -> Click Generate PDF -> See PDF download start
Navigate to /events/:id/summary -> Click Record Manual Payment -> Fill payment details -> Click Save -> See payment recorded in payments tab
Navigate to /events/new -> Complete wizard but equipment conflict detected at Step 4 -> See equipment conflict warning -> Prevent saving until conflict resolved
Navigate to /events/new -> Attempt to initiate Stripe checkout -> Click pay button -> Redirect to Stripe checkout -> Return to /events/:id/payment-success

features.name: Product Catalog
features.description: Manage products and their recipes, linking ingredients and equipment from inventory and viewing recipe cost breakdowns.
user_flows: Navigate to /products -> View product list with search and category filter -> Click New Product button

Navigate to /products/new -> Fill product form (name, category, base price) -> Upload product image -> Add recipe ingredient from inventory -> Set ingredient quantity -> Click Save -> Redirect to /products -> See new product in list
Navigate to /products -> Click product -> Navigate to /products/:id -> See product details with recipe cost breakdown
Navigate to /products -> Create product until basic plan limit reached -> See upgrade banner -> Attempt to save new product -> See plan limit error and prompt to upgrade

features.name: Inventory Management
features.description: Track ingredients and equipment with current stock, minimum alerts, and CRUD operations.
user_flows: Navigate to /inventory -> View inventory list -> Filter by type (ingredient/equipment) -> See filtered results

Navigate to /inventory -> Click New Item button -> Navigate to /inventory/new -> Fill form (name, type, current_stock, minimum_stock, unit, unit_cost) -> Click Save -> Redirect to /inventory -> See new item in list
Navigate to /inventory -> Click an item -> Navigate to /inventory/:id -> See item details with stock info
Navigate to /inventory -> Click delete on an item -> See confirmation dialog -> Confirm delete -> See item removed from list

features.name: Calendar View
features.description: Provide a dual calendar and list view of events with month navigation, status filters, date drill-down and CSV export.
user_flows: Navigate to /calendar -> See calendar grid view with events
Navigate to /calendar -> Toggle to list view -> See events listed
Navigate to /calendar -> Click next month control -> See events for next month
Navigate to /calendar -> Click on a date in calendar -> See events for that date -> Click an event -> Navigate to /events/:id/summary
Navigate to /calendar -> Use status filter (quoted/confirmed/completed/cancelled) -> See filtered event list
Navigate to /calendar -> Use export to CSV -> See CSV download

features.name: Global Search
features.description: Unified search across clients, events, products and inventory returning categorized results with direct navigation to details.
user_flows: Navigate to /search -> Type search query in search input -> See categorized results (clients, events, products, inventory)
Navigate to /search -> Type search query -> Click a client result -> Navigate to /clients/:id
Navigate to /search -> Type search query with no matches -> See no results message

features.name: Settings
features.description: Manage user profile and business settings including logo, brand color, contract defaults, and subscription portal access.
user_flows: Navigate to /settings -> Edit profile fields (name, email, business name) -> Upload logo -> Set brand color -> Click Save -> See updated profile
Navigate to /settings -> Edit contract defaults (deposit percent, cancellation days, refund percent) -> Click Save -> See updated contract defaults
Navigate to /settings -> Click Manage subscription -> Redirect to Stripe portal
Navigate to /settings -> Upload invalid image file -> Click Save -> See image upload validation error

features.name: Pricing and Subscriptions
features.description: Display plan comparison and allow users to upgrade via Stripe checkout and return to the app after payment.
user_flows: Navigate to /pricing -> View plan comparison (Basic vs Pro) -> Click upgrade button on Pro -> Redirect to Stripe checkout -> Complete payment -> Return to app -> See upgraded plan status
Navigate to /pricing -> Click upgrade button -> Redirect to Stripe checkout -> Payment fails or cancelled -> Return to app -> See checkout error message and remain on /pricing

features.name: Admin Dashboard
features.description: Provide platform analytics for admins including user counts, plan distribution and signup trends.
user_flows: Navigate to /admin (admin user) -> See total users and plan breakdown -> See plan distribution pie chart -> See signup trends bar chart
Navigate to /admin (non-admin user) -> See access denied or be redirected to /dashboard

features.name: Admin User Management
features.description: Allow platform admins to list users, view usage metrics per user and perform actions like forcing an upgrade.
user_flows: Navigate to /admin/users (admin user) -> View user list with email, name, plan, subscription status -> Click a user to view counts
Navigate to /admin/users -> Click upgrade button for a user -> Confirm upgrade -> See user plan updated
Navigate to /admin/users (non-admin user) -> Attempt to access /admin/users -> See access denied

routes.description: User login with email and password
Main dashboard with KPIs, charts, inventory alerts
Global search across clients, events, products, inventory
Calendar and event list view (dual mode)
Event detail with payments, photos, PDFs
List all clients with search, sort, pagination
Client detail view with event history
Inventory item detail with stock info
User profile, business settings, contracts, subscriptions

features.name: User Login
features.description: Login with email and password credentials
user_interactions: See error message on invalid credentials

features.name: User Registration
features.description: Register a new account with email, password, and name
user_interactions: See validation errors if fields invalid

features.description: Request password reset email and reset password with token

user_interactions: View financial KPI cards (net sales, cash collected, VAT)
Click on event to navigate to event summary

Sort clients by name, phone, email, city
Fill client form (name, phone, email, address, city, notes)
View client details with event history

Step 2 - Add products from catalog with quantities and prices
Step 3 - Add extra line items (description, cost, price)
Step 4 - Check equipment conflicts, add equipment
Step 5 - Set discount, tax rate, deposit percent, cancellation policy
View event summary with all details
Generate PDF (budget, contract, invoice, shopping list)
Initiate Stripe checkout for online payment

user_interactions: View product list with search and category filter
Fill product form (name, category, base price)
View product details with recipe cost breakdown

features.name: Inventory Management

user_interactions: Fill form (name, type, stock, minimum stock, unit, unit cost)

features.name: Calendar View
features.description: Calendar and list view of events with date navigation
user_interactions: Toggle between calendar and list view
Click on a date to see events
Click event to navigate to event summary

features.name: Global Search
features.description: Unified search across clients, events, products, and inventory
user_interactions: Type search query in search input
View categorized results (clients, events, products, inventory)
Click on a result to navigate to its detail page

features.name: Settings
features.description: User profile, business settings, contract defaults, subscription management
user_interactions: Edit contract defaults (deposit percent, cancellation days, refund percent)
Edit contract template with variable placeholders

features.name: Pricing and Subscriptions
features.description: View plans and upgrade via Stripe checkout

features.name: Admin Dashboard
features.description: Platform analytics with user stats, plan distribution, signup trends
user_interactions: View total users and plan breakdown

features.name: Admin User Management
features.description: View and manage all platform users
user_interactions: View user list with email, name, plan, subscription status
Click upgrade button for a user

known_limitations.issue: Auth supports both httpOnly cookies and localStorage tokens for backward compatibility
known_limitations.impact: Dual auth mechanism adds complexity; localStorage tokens less secure than cookies

known_limitations.issue: Plan limits enforced client-side only via usePlanLimits hook
known_limitations.impact: Users could bypass limits by manipulating frontend; backend should also enforce
Large PDFs may be slow on low-end devices

known_limitations.issue: Admin routes rely on frontend AdminRoute wrapper
known_limitations.impact: Admin access control should also be enforced by backend middleware
